title: boesenbergia albomaculata
intro: Boesenbergia albomaculata, also known as Ginger Lily or Pink Butterfly Ginger, is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, derived from its rhizomes and leaves. The health benefits of Boesenbergia albomaculata include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Boesenbergia albomaculata can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health issues.
